verdict: CeraVe's formulation is exceptional for budget skincare, featuring a robust ceramide complex that strengthens the skin barrier while hyaluronic acid provides deep hydration. The inclusion of niacinamide and peptides elevates this beyond basic moisturizers.

_research.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream
pros: Clinically-proven ceramide blend repairs barrier function
_research.con: Heavier texture may feel occlusive for oily or acne-prone skin types.
